bestiary.boss_jade_guardian.desc: Heng Yue Sect guardian at the mountain gate — the first ordeal Wang Lin faces bare-handed on Chu Tước Star.
bestiary.boss_mist_stalker.desc: Ghost spirit beast of U Linh Mountain. It stalks cultivators who lack talent but refuse to flee.
bestiary.boss_bandit_lord.desc: Chief of Zhao Kingdom mountain bandits — ruthless, but no match for Wang Lin after Heaven Reverse.
bestiary.boss_seal_warden.desc: Warden of the ancient seal beneath Moon Lake — corruption stirs as Wang Lin draws near.
bestiary.boss_desert_sovereign.desc: Fire Burn demonic cultivator ruling the scorching sands of La Thiên Star Domain.
bestiary.boss_thunder_avatar.desc: Avatar of heavenly thunder on the tribulation pass — heaven tests those who reverse fate.
bestiary.boss_frost_queen.desc: Demon queen of the ice palace ruins — echoes of past lives linger in her halls.
bestiary.boss_rift_horror.desc: Heart demon horror before Lôi Tiên Gate — final trial within the Inner Realm, not the Outer battlefield.
bestiary.boss_celestial_guardian.desc: Guardian of Lôi Tiên Gate — blocks entry to Lôi Tiên Realm within the Inner Realm.
bestiary.boss_void_sovereign.desc: Thunder Immortal Lord at Lôi Tiên Hall — final confrontation before ascension in Lôi Tiên Realm.
bestiary.enemy_slime.desc: Low spirit beasts near Wang Family Village — pests Wang Lin fought with bare fists.
bestiary.enemy_heng_yue_disciple.desc: Outer disciples of Heng Yue Sect — they patrol the gate trial and drive away mortals with poor roots.
bestiary.enemy_village_scavenger.desc: Looters picking through Wang Family Village ruins after the fire — desperate, not yet cultivators.
bestiary.enemy_village_spirit_pest.desc: Low spirit pests bred from lingering qi in the ashes — the first foes Wang Lin fought bare-handed.
bestiary.enemy_wolf.desc: Wild spirit hounds drawn to ghost qi — they roam village outskirts and haunted ridges alike.
bestiary.enemy_bandit_thug.desc: Mountain bandits on Zhao roads — the mortal trials Wang Lin overcame.
bestiary.enemy_guard_patrol.desc: Zhao Kingdom patrol guards — they tax the roads and cut down those who cannot pay.
bestiary.enemy_spirit_wisp.desc: Mist spirits of Ghost Spirit Mountain — they strike when your guard drops in the fog.
bestiary.enemy_spirit_moth.desc: Spirit moths lured by ghost-light on the haunted ridge.
bestiary.enemy_elite_shadow.desc: Shadow elite guarding the fortune cave — tests whether will outlast dread.
bestiary.enemy_totem.desc: Gate ward formation at Heng Yue Sect — pulses spirit bolts at failed trial candidates.
bestiary.enemy_spirit_fox.desc: Little White — fox spirit on Ghost Spirit Mountain who chose to walk beside Wang Lin.
bestiary.enemy_storm_hawk.desc: Tribulation hawks circling thunder clouds on the heavenly tribulation pass.
bestiary.enemy_gate_sentinel.desc: Sentinels of the Ascension Gate in the Outer Realm.
bestiary.enemy_void_shade.desc: Void shades at the edge of Lôi Tiên Realm — remnants of failed ascenders.
